lore.minecraft.echo_shard: An item that can be used to craft a Recovery Compass or light a Bystone portal. It's an uncommon find.
lore.farworld.cherries: A food that drops in bulk from Cherry Leaves, which can be consumed to restore a slight amount of health and saturation.
lore.farworld.crystallias: A food that drops in the Bystone's Crystallia bushes. Slows the fading of positive status effects, and hastens the fading of negative ones.
lore.farworld.pear: A food that drops from Birch Leaves and can restore a small amount of saturation.
lore.farworld.mystic_pear: An item that can be eaten to grant extra mobility.
lore.farworld.enchanted_mystic_pear: An item that can cause anyone who consumes it to temporarily become the most intrepid explorer. Quite costly.
lore.farworld.allsaw: A rare tool found in Stronghold chests that can mine any block. Alternatively, you can switch it into precision mode, allowing it Silk Touch at the cost of some mining speed.
lore.farworld.brittle_powder: An item that can be used to rapidly grow plants, flowers, and crops at surplus rates. Does not work on saplings.
lore.farworld.gloomspores: This item can be used to brew Potions of Paralysis, or combined with Cobalt to make Gloom Plates.
lore.farworld.gloom_plate: Can be combined with stone tools at a Smithing Table to reinforce them into Gloomstone tools.
lore.farworld.geode_fruit: A tasty fruit grown inside the Geode Nuts that can be found on Stonewood trees.
lore.farworld.durathyst_cluster: A mystical geode taken from an Amethyst Construct. Can restore durability using stored experience if applied to a tool.
lore.farworld.wishbone: A small, brittle trinket that can teleport you back home once. Can be repaired using Bottles o' Enchanting.
lore.farworld.raw_cobalt: An ore that can be smelted into a Cobalt Ingot.
lore.farworld.cobalt_ingot: A smooth ingot that can be used to craft equipment and utilities.
lore.farworld.soul_steel: An alloy that can be used to upgrade your Iron tools into Soul Steel, granting extra reach.
lore.farworld.smithstone_remnant: An ancient stone, containing trace amounts of magic once used for forging Smithing Templates.
lore.farworld.sludge_ball: A piece of sludge looted from an enemy.
lore.farworld.sludge_arrow: An arrow coated in sludge. It slows enemies and decreases their jump height on hit.
lore.farworld.breeze_boots: Boots that, when worn, grant extra movement speed.
accessory.item.farworld.golem_heart.desc:
§rOn Hit Enemy:
§9Upwards Knockback
Downwards Knockback When Mid-air
accessory.item.farworld.blaze_locket.des:
§rRight Click with Axe:
§9Slowed Movement
Empower Next Attack
accessory.item.farworld.breeze_ring.desc:
§rRight Click with Axe or Mace:
§9Perform Leap
Increase Attack By Fall Distance
§rRight Click with Empty Hand:
§9Dragon Breath
8 Second Cooldown
item.farworld.soul_steel_upgrade_smithin: Add iron armor, weapon, or tool
item.farworld.black_ice_upgrade_smithing: Add netherite or soul steel armor, weapon, or tool
effect.farworld.sludged.desc: Decreases jump height and movement speed.
effect.farworld.sparkling.desc: Decreases fading speed for other positive effects, and increases fading speed for negative effects.
lore.farworld.curious_component: Dubious circuitry salvaged from a dismantled Redstone Curiosity. Quite useful for crafting.
lore.farworld.charge_bunker: A powerful cannon fashioned from Curious Components. Fires a powerful close-range blast with mean kickback.
lore.farworld.milk_berries: A food that can be scavenged in Dusty Shelves and can restore a small amount of saturation quickly.
lore.farworld.crystallia_bush: A bush which can grow Crystallias, found in the Geodic Columns in the Bystone.
lore.farworld.redstone_curiosity_block: A dormant construct made by an ancient, unknown mastermind.
nonlore_tooltip.farworld.redstone_curios: Perhaps, if you power this, §4something will happen...
lore.farworld.redstone_teleporter: A block that, when given an item and powered, will teleport any entities on top to the nearest other Teleporter holding the same item.
lore.farworld.dust_glass: A dusty, fogged sort of glass made from dust found in the Bystone.
lore.farworld.shadow_dust_glass: A dusty, fogged sort of glass made from dust found in the Bystone and tinted a shadowy black.
lore.farworld.crystal_dust_glass: A dusty, fogged sort of glass made from dust found in the Bystone and tinted a crystalline purple.
lore.farworld.gloomcap: A symbiotic mushroom found in Dark Forests, known for its vampiric venom. Drops Gloomspores unless sheared. Toxic if eaten directly.
lore.farworld.dimlight: A source of light found in the Dusty Shelves.
lore.farworld.geode_nut: A form of nut that grows from Stonewood trees. The nut can be roasted to reveal the fruit inside.
lore.farworld.nether_iron_ore: An ore that can be smelted or mined to reveal the Iron inside.
lore.farworld.soul_steel_block: A solid block of Soul Steel.
lore.farworld.pointed_amethyst: An amethyst spike found in the deepest of caves.
lore.farworld.flowstone: A smooth block of stone gathered from the Bystone.
lore.farworld.cobbled_flowstone: A cobbled block of stone gathered from the Bystone.
lore.farworld.cobbled_flowstone_slab: A cobbled slab of stone gathered from the Bystone.
lore.farworld.cobbled_flowstone_stairs: A set of cobbled stairs made of stone gathered from the Bystone.
lore.farworld.flowstone_bricks: A block of stone bricks gathered from the Bystone.
lore.farworld.flowstone_brick_slab: A brick slab of stone gathered from the Bystone.
lore.farworld.flowstone_brick_stairs: A set of stone brick stairs from the Bystone.
lore.farworld.flowstone_brick_wall: A brick wall made of stone gathered from the Bystone.
lore.farworld.dusty_flowstone_bricks: A block of dusty stone bricks gathered from the Bystone.
lore.farworld.dusty_flowstone_brick_slab: A brick slab of dusty stone gathered from the Bystone.
lore.farworld.dusty_flowstone_brick_stai: A set of dusty stone brick stairs from the Bystone.
lore.farworld.dusty_flowstone_brick_wall: A brick wall made of dusty stone gathered from the Bystone.
lore.farworld.dusty_flowstone: A block of Flowstone with dust coating one side.
lore.farworld.lush_flowstone_bricks: A block of lush stone bricks gathered from the Bystone.
lore.farworld.lush_flowstone_brick_slab: A brick slab of lush stone gathered from the Bystone.
lore.farworld.lush_flowstone_brick_stair: A set of lush stone brick stairs from the Bystone.
lore.farworld.lush_flowstone_brick_wall: A brick wall made of lush stone gathered from the Bystone.
lore.farworld.lush_flowstone: A block of Flowstone with moss growing on one side.
lore.farworld.sleekstone: A brighter kind of stone, shocked smooth by the intense current of the Hypercharged Caves.
lore.farworld.cobbled_sleekstone: A cobbled block of Sleekstone from the Bystone.
lore.farworld.cobbled_sleekstone_stairs: A set of cobbled stairs made of Sleekstone.
lore.farworld.sleekstone_brick_stairs: A set of Sleekstone brick stairs.
lore.farworld.sleekstone_brick_wall: A brick wall made of Sleekstone.
lore.farworld.charged_sleekstone: A powerfully-charged block of stone, eroded smooth and powered by the Hypercharged Caves.
lore.farworld.charged_sleekstone_slab: A powerfully-charged slab of stone, eroded smooth and powered by the Hypercharged Caves.
lore.farworld.charged_sleekstone_stairs: Powerfully-charged stairs made of stone, eroded smooth and powered by the Hypercharged Caves.
lore.farworld.charged_sleekstone_bricks: A block of Charged Sleekstone bricks.
lore.farworld.charged_sleekstone_brick_s: A brick slab of Charged Sleekstone.
A set of Charged Sleekstone brick stairs.
lore.farworld.charged_sleekstone_brick_w: A brick wall made of Charged Sleekstone.
lore.farworld.encrusted_basalt: A block of smooth Basalt with amethyst budding from the inside.
lore.farworld.dense_coal_ore: A densely-packed ore that can be mined with a Stone tool or higher to obtain Coal at surplus rates.
lore.farworld.dense_iron_ore: A densely-packed ore that can be mined with a Stone tool or higher to obtain Iron at surplus rates.
lore.farworld.dense_gold_ore: A densely-packed ore that can be mined with an Iron tool or higher to obtain Gold at surplus rates.
lore.farworld.dense_redstone_ore: A densely-packed ore that can be mined with an Iron tool or higher to obtain Redstone at surplus rates.
lore.farworld.cobalt_ore: A densely-packed ore that can be mined with an Iron tool or higher to obtain some Cobalt.
lore.farworld.flowstone_cache: A patch of Flowstone chock-full of goodies! Can be mined with a Stone pickaxe or better to obtain Amethyst, Emeralds, or Diamonds.
lore.farworld.dust_block: A block of brittle dust that can be excavated with any shovel for some goodies.
lore.farworld.dust_sheet: A clump of brittle dust that can be excavated with any shovel.
lore.farworld.crystal_lamp: A lamp made from amethyst blocks and basalt.
lore.farworld.large_chain: A large, heavy chain made of solid iron.
lore.farworld.stonewood_log: A chopped piece of Stonewood, used in building and crafting.
lore.farworld.stonewood: A chopped piece of Stonewood, used in building and crafting.
lore.farworld.stripped_stonewood_log: A stripped piece of Stonewood covered in bark, used in building and crafting.
lore.farworld.stripped_stonewood: A stripped piece of Stonewood covered in bark, used in building and crafting.
lore.farworld.stonewood_planks: Planks made of Stonewood, used in building and crafting.
lore.farworld.stonewood_leaves_flowered: Flowery leaves from a Stonewood tree.
lore.farworld.fruitless_crystallia_leave: Leaves from an overgrown Crystallia bush.
lore.farworld.crystallia_leaves: Excess fruit from an overgrown Crystallia bush.
lore.farworld.hanging_vines_end: Vines grown in the Lush Shallows.
lore.farworld.lush_foliage: Grass grown from the floor of the Lush Shallows.
lore.farworld.flowering_lush_foliage: Flowers grown from the floor of the Lush Shallows.
lore.farworld.hanging_flora: Flowering vines grown in the Lush Shallows.
lore.farworld.stonewood_sapling: A sapling that grows into a Stonewood tree when planted on Flowstone or Lush Flowstone.
lore.farworld.redstone_pillar_block: A large, sturdy pillar of Redstone which emits a consistent redstone signal in one single direction.
lore.farworld.black_ice: A deposit of highly pressurized ice formed in the End's extreme conditions.
lore.farworld.echo_lantern: A lantern infused with Echo Shards.
lore.farworld.bloomed: A small, timid spider that can be befriended using a raw potato, which it bites into like an apple.
lore.farworld.sludge: A territorial sort of slime found under blocks in the Deep Dark. It uses small gems to mimic a face in order to ward off predators.
lore.farworld.soul_golem: A large construct that can be built using three Soul Steel blocks and a Shroomlight. It must be fueled using coal.
lore.farworld.brittle: A decrepit, crumbling skeleton from a corpse long dehydrated. Even so much as touching it makes you feel weak.
lore.farworld.dustbug: A larger Silverfish which will run away from you. If disturbed, it will send its brothers and sisters to fight you in schools.
lore.farworld.goliath: A hulking spider found in the Bystone. It can be befriended using Geode Fruit, but if you have none, it's highly protective of its territory.
lore.farworld.amethyst_construct: A clunky construct created by someone, or something, in the Bystone. It can grind some items down into glittering dust that can be used for repairs.
lore.farworld.scrapped: A repurposed zombie made into a formidable weapon. It can shoot fast-travelling lasers from afar, but keep a close distance and it will struggle to aim. Just don't get too close!
lore.farworld.obelisk: Large Blackstone monoliths designed to hinder, not harm. History has forgotten why they're here, but they haven't.
enchantment.farworld.scything.desc: Negates mining speed decreases while in precision mode.
lore.farworld.scything: Negates mining speed decreases while in precision mode.
enchantment.farworld.attunement.desc: Allows the Wishbone to be attuned to a Lodestone.
lore.farworld.attunement: Allows the Wishbone to be attuned to a Lodestone.
advancement.farworld.friend_of_arthropod: Befriend a Bloomed by feeding it a potato
advancement.farworld.saw_it_all.desc: Find the Allsaw in a Stronghold chest
advancement.farworld.black_light.desc: Open a portal to the Bystone by using an Echo Shard or a Diamond on a row of hanging Lanterns
Craft a Soul Steel Ingot using Iron, Quartz and Soul Sand
advancement.farworld.borne_of_souls.desc: Construct a Soul Steel Golem with three Soul Steel blocks and a Shroomlight on top
advancement.farworld.surplus_fashion.des: Equip an accessory by right clicking with a piece of armor in the inventory
advancement.farworld.decked_out.desc: Equip a full set of armor with an accessory each
advancement.farworld.the_gentle_giant.de: Befriend a Goliath by feeding it Geode Fruit
advancement.farworld.gloom_and_doom.desc: Find a Bystone Outpost and obtain a Gloomstone smithing template
advancement.farworld.darker_than_dark.de: Loot a Black Ice smithing template from an End City
advancement.farworld.in_the_shade.desc: Find a Gloomcap mushroom in a dark oak forest and harvest its spores
advancement.farworld.a_branching_path.de: Loot a Soul Steel smithing template from a Nether Fortress
Activate and defeat the Redstone Curiosity, a formidable battle machine of unknown origin left dormant in the Bystone
Give an Amethyst Construct an item to grind into experience
accessory.farworld.accessory_detach_hint: §7Right click over an empty inventory slot to unequip
accessory.farworld.accessory_helmet_desc: §cHelmet Accessory: §7Can be applied to helmets by right-clicking
accessory.farworld.accessory_chestplate_: §cChestplate Accessory: §7Can be applied to chestplates by right-clicking
accessory.farworld.accessory_leggings_de: §cLegging Accessory: §7Can be applied to leggings by right-clicking
accessory.farworld.accessory_boots_descr: §cBoot Accessory: §7Can be applied to boots by right-clicking
